generated_categories.name: Basic Input Validation

generated_categories.description: Tests validation and detection of authentication components in URLs, including malformed or malicious content.

generated_categories.name: Protocol and Port Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests validation of protocols and port numbers, including requirements for valid protocols and specific port ranges.
